name: Procore PC-90L Dry Cabinet
description: Dengan Procore PC-90L Dry Cabinet anti jamur, Electric dry cabinet Procore di lengkapi kontrol digital dan layar indikator LED. Kontrol digital berguna untuk melakukan penyetingan kelembaban udara secara otomatis.

features.Key Features:: Item No : PC – 90S Dry Cabinet | Function : Reduce and maintain the humidity | Display Mode : LED Display | Capacity : 90 ltrs dry cabinet for camera | Product Size : 375*385*650mm | Carton Size : 440*450*740mm | Power : <8W | Volts(V) : AC100-240V / DC 5V 2A | Adjustive Shelf : 3 pcs (come with padded liners) | LED LightingInterior : Yes
